subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Rustam Behmard besought that this letter be written, and I, upon hearing his name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء رستم بهمرد خواهش نگارش این نامه نمود من نیز چون نام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love and unity
